explanation: Using the triple angle formula for hyperbolic tangent: tanh(3x) = (3 tanh x + tanhВі x) / (1 + 3 tanhВІ x). Substituting tanh x = 1/3 yields 7/9.

text: The function f(x) = sech x on R has the range
explanation: sech x = 1 / cosh x. At x=0, sech 0 = 1. As |x| increases, cosh x > 1, so 0 < sech x вүӨ 1. Range is [0, 1].

text: Which of the following is true about f(x) = 3 sinh x - 2 cosh x, вҲҖx вҲҲ R
options: f is a strictly increasing function on R
f is a strictly decreasing function on R
explanation: Derivative f'(x) = 3 cosh x - 2 sinh x > 0 for all x (verified by minimum analysis), so strictly increasing.
